name: llm-finetuning
title: LLM Fine-Tuning with Unsloth (Done Right)
description: Fine-tune small open-weight LLMs locally with Unsloth + QLoRA: model selection, data formatting, MLflow experiment tracking, zero-shot vs fine-tuned comparison, GGUF export for llama.cpp deployment. Swap models via dropdown and compare runs in MLflow. Includes a runnable marimo notebook demonstrating text classification with Gemma-4.
